title: senna cumingii
intro: Senna cumingii, also known as the Philippine senna, is a shrub native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Senna cumingii include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, among others. Senna cumingii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
